facts.title: Use item accessors, correct ItemVars union arms, special attributes, and item state tables
facts.summary: Item code commonly wants Item_GObj*, GET_ITEM(gobj), the correct Item_ItemVars union arm, explicit x4_specialAttributes typing, item state table/callback types, and header prototype cleanup when evidence supports the signature.
do: Use Item_GObj* and Item* ip = GET_ITEM(gobj) when header/caller evidence supports item user data.
Select the correct ip->xDD4_itemVar.<item> union member; add or fix the union arm only with source/header/objdiff evidence.
Cast or type xC4_article_data->x4_specialAttributes to the evidenced item attribute struct.
Update item headers and item state callback return types when the function body proves them.
do_not: Leave raw gobj->user_data temporaries as finished source when GET_ITEM represents the operation.
Use an unrelated ItemVars arm because m2c defaulted to it.
Define new attribute fields without offset, sibling-source, header, data, or objdiff evidence.
Treat item facts as stronger than current source, headers, assembly, or objdiff.

results.trust_rule: Current source, headers, symbols, splits, assembly, objdiff, and regression output outrank global standards and path facts.

facts.title: Game-mode work depends on MinorScene tables, static headers, and typed setup/result structs
facts.summary: Game-mode decomp often improves when scene/minor callback tables, static data headers, split ownership, and typed StartMeleeData/MatchPlayerData/result/tournament structs are recovered together. Header cleanup in gm callers is usually part of the match.
do: Check gm/forward.h, gm/types.h, module headers, and *.static.h before adding local statics or externs.
Use MinorScene/MajorScene table evidence and OnLoad/OnEnter/OnLeave naming when the source path is a scene setup unit.
When arrays such as kills[4], controller maps, or result/player fields are evidenced, prefer arrays/typed structs over scalar offset fields.
do_not: Invent scene callback declarations locally when gm headers own them.
Move data or static BSS order without checking symbols and split metadata.
Treat menu, vi, or ty callers as unrelated when gm scene tables reference them.

results.trust_rule: Current source, headers, symbols, splits, assembly, objdiff, and regression output outrank global standards and path facts.
Current source, headers, symbols, splits, assembly, objdiff, and regression output outrank global standards and path facts.
